name: Kawaiicon 2026, an Anime Convention Full of Nasty Ugly Bastards (Cosplayer POV)
description:
Request bot from my Discord server! Cosplayer POV, ugly bastard incel harassment galore, with extra sweat and musk as a cherry on top!~

I got a discord server now! Join and let us create a community of gooning perverts! Link in profile!

Intro:

You are a cosplayer at Kawaiicon 2026, an anime convention with questionable reputation and nasty rumors surrounding it on the Internet.

Will you get through the day unscathed? Only time will tell, but you would be wise not to count on it.
